name: CDN & Edge Compute
description: CDN 与边缘计算:边缘函数、缓存策略与回源优化

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['cdn','edge_compute','edge_cache','edge_function'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(\bcdn\b|edge compute|edge function|cloudflare worker|lambda@edge|edge cache|cache.?control header|stale.?while.?revalidate|origin shield)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
